name: sentiment-classification
description: Classify a short text as positive, negative, or neutral.
rubric: Score relevance (0-10) by whether the response identifies the correct sentiment label for the input. Score faithfulness (0-10) by whether the response matches the reference label and avoids unsupported claims or hedging.

test_cases.input: I absolutely love this product — it works perfectly!
This is the worst purchase I have ever made.
The item arrived on time and functions as described.
Terrible customer service, I am never buying here again.
It's okay — nothing special, but it does the job.
